meta.title: Czarne Mleko | Coffee & Breakfast
meta.description: Czarne Mleko — coffee, breakfast and lunch. Dąbrowskiego 68, Poznań.

hero.headline: coffee, breakfast, slow mornings
hero.eyebrow: with love for people and food
hero.subtitle: Restaurant
hero.heroImageAlt: Czarne Mleko café on Dąbrowskiego in Poznań

intro.title: From morning to evening
intro.lead: Breakfast, lunch, seasonal plates and specialty coffee — honest food made with heart.
intro.sageLead: Specialty coffee, house bakes and a calm atmosphere — in the heart of Jeżyce.

classics.title: Our classics
classics.lead: Seasonal ingredients, home recipes and flavours worth coming back for.
classics.lunchDesc: Panini, salads and warm dishes every day.
classics.bakedDesc: House cakes and sweet treats perfect with coffee.
classics.coffeeDesc: Espresso, flat white and latte on specialty beans.
classics.specialtyDesc: Matcha, seasonal lattes and alternative brews.

highlight.breakfastBody: Toast, eggs and savoury plates for a slow start — served daily until 2 p.m.
highlight.brunchBody: Warm dishes and seasonal flavours — perfect when you want to linger.
highlight.coffeeBody: Espresso, pour-over and milk classics — roasted and brewed with balance.

menu.title: Menu
menu.lead: Breakfast, lunch, sweet treats and drinks — all day.

french_toast.name: French toast
french_toast.desc: French toast on homemade brioche with cinnamon, caramelized plum, crumble, and sour cream.

brioche_kimchi.name: Brioche with kimchi & fried egg
brioche_kimchi.desc: Brioche with kimchi, fried egg, cream cheese, lamb's lettuce salad, cucumber, onion, chives, and sesame.

chorizo_omelette.name: Chorizo omelette
chorizo_omelette.desc: Omelette with tomato sauce, homemade brioche, and seasonal salad.

panini_chicken.name: With chicken
panini_chicken.desc: Roasted chicken and camembert, served with salad and honey-mustard sauce.

panini_vege.name: Vegetarian
panini_vege.desc: Mozzarella and sun-dried tomatoes, served with salad and honey-mustard sauce.

scrambled.name: Scrambled eggs
scrambled.desc: 2 eggs with yellow cheese, ham, vegetable salad, honey-mustard sauce, and warm bread.

sandwiches.name: Sandwiches
sandwiches.desc: with chicken and camembert · with sun-dried tomatoes and mozzarella · with avocado and sun-dried tomato paste

toasts.name: Toasts
toasts.desc: Served with yellow cheese, ham, mayo sauce, and vegetable salad. Small / large sizes available.

salad_chicken.name: With chicken
salad_chicken.desc: Chicken, camembert, vegetables, honey-mustard sauce, warm bread.

salad_salmon.name: With salmon
salad_salmon.desc: Smoked salmon, mozzarella, vegetables, honey-mustard sauce, warm bread.

lavender_ginger.name: Lavender ginger infusion
lavender_ginger.desc:
Lavender ginger infusion with citrus and honey.
400 ml

warming_tea.name: Warming tea
warming_tea.desc:
Black tea with citrus, cloves, and raspberries.
400 ml

cold_alt.name: Coffee alternatives & cold drinks
cold_alt.desc: Aromatic teas · black tea · green tea · ginger infusion · cocoa · fresh orange juice · fruit smoothie · fruit cocktail · sparkling / still water · bottled drinks

cold_coffee.name: Cold coffee & summer drinks
cold_coffee.desc: Doppio with orange juice · tonic espresso · iced drip · lemonade · iced fruit tea · ice matcha · matcha tonic

latte.name: Latte
latte.desc: small / large · plant milk option available

about.title: About us
about.altFriends: Coffee with friends at Czarne Mleko

testimonials.title: Reviews
testimonials.quote1: You smell the coffee from the door — croissant and flat white are top notch.
testimonials.quote2: Shakshuka like on holiday — I’m back every weekend brunch.
testimonials.quote3: Unhurried service — perfect with a book.
testimonials.quote4: The best coffee around — flat white and cake hit the mark every time.
testimonials.quote5: Calm space and breakfast before work — exactly what I was looking for.
testimonials.quote6: Easy-going service — feels like coffee at a friend’s place.
testimonials.quote7: Weekend brunch is our ritual — generous plates and bold flavours.
testimonials.quote8: Cosy room and music in the background — ideal for coffee with friends.
testimonials.quote9: Especially the shakshuka and house bakes — I keep coming back.
